title: DevOps Engineer I
description: HashiCorp, the infrastructure automation leader, seeks a DevOps Engineer I to support cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines. Working fully remote, you'll manage infrastructure-as-code, optimize CI/CD workflows, and contribute to reliability across our platform. Join a distributed team building the tools that power modern infrastructure.
responsibilities: Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure using Terraform and Kubernetes
Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation
Monitor system performance and troubleshoot infrastructure issues
Collaborate with engineering teams on infrastructure improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance
